channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Overflowing litter bin, 8th March
item.description:
Bin opposite the Pelton Arms and 3 more along Banning Street west side northward.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Pelton Road, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: A pile of junk left on pavement Savernake Road and St Edmunds Road junction, 8th March
item.description:
Rubbish fly tipped on footway needs cleared

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): St Edmunds Road, Edmonton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bus stop W Bromley Road / Lewisham Town Hall towards Lewisham : missing red round letter W ID finial, 8th March
item.description:
Bus stop W Bromley Road / Lewisham Town Hall towards Lewisham : missing red round letter W ID finial See photographs How do these go missing ?? See here how it looked when was still in place ... ... Https://www.instantstreetview.com/@51.443964,-0.020301,214.32h,1.28p,2.7z,MWwvwybRyUyt7HNT4K1ITQ Thank you

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bromley Road, Ladywell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flyt, 8th March
item.description:
Food, household waste, all kinds.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 184, Croydon Road, Anerley, Greater London

item.description:
Assorted junk abandoned on pavement

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Galliard Road, Edmonton

item.title: Mattress dumped on pavement. Chester Gardens northern kerb corner with Norfolk Road almost opposite no 55/57 Chester Gsrdens to number, 8th March
item.description:
A mattress dumped on footway. Could thus be removed please?

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Norfolk Road, Enfield
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti, 8th March
item.description:
This is a historic London County Council (LCC) cast-iron marker. Please ensure removal methods do not damage the heritage metal/patina."

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Waterworks Lane, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: A few rubbish bags behind the bushes, 8th March
item.description:
A few rubbish bags behind the bushes. Please make sure that you collect the full bags and thw rubbish of the bags that have been ripped open by the foxes. There are kilos amd kilos of rubbish in that area

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Woolacombe Road, Kidbrooke
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Huge potholes with a lot of debris, 8th March
item.description:
Very large potholes near the junction of Prospero Road and St John's Way. Debris is scattered all over the road. It has been like this for at least more than a week with no sign of rectification.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1, Prospero Road, Archway, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Blocked drain reported over two years ago and still NOT resolved, 8th March
item.description:
This road gully has been reported to BCC over half a dozen times starting in Feb 2024, that's over two years ago, and is still unresolved. Absolutely appalling lack of diligence, consideration , local service and interest. Fed up with being fobbed off by a bunch of uninterest council employees. All in all a total f***ing disgrace!!!!
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 33, Stone Park Avenue, Eden Park, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipped rubbish, 8th March
item.description:
Large amount of fly tipped rubbish on grass verge next to pavement. Also other rubbish tipped in similar manner along the road.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Ray Lamb Way, Slade Green, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Moss on grownd ,play area , slip hazard, 8th March
item.description:

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Redcar Street, Camberwell, Greater London

item.title: Fly tip, 8th March
item.description:
Some kind of rub fly tipped. Bin is also full

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): White Horse Hill, Coldharbour, Greater London

item.title: Overflowing Bin, 8th March
item.description:
This bin has been ready to collect for some time now. It’s overflowing and people passing by are adding to the mess on the street. It needs urgent attention to prevent the littering getting worse.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): The Village, Charlton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Unacceptable levels of litter - Pennethorne Road, 8th March
item.description:
The bin men are not collecting the bins and the litter pickers and not cleaning the streets. This is becoming a serious issues. please sort

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 2, Pennethorne Road, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Amazon left a huge bag on our street, 8th March
item.description:
Dear Bromley Council, I would like to report an Amazon Logistics carrier bag that has been left on our street outside my house and has not been collected. The item is a large mesh Amazon carrier bag/box, clearly marked “Property of Amazon Logistics.” It is not household rubbish and it does not belong to me. I have contacted Amazon several times to ask them to remove it, but they have refused to take responsibility and told me to contact the council. As this item has been abandoned outside my property and is disrupting the street, I would be grateful if you could arrange for its collection. My address is on Durban Road, BR3 4EY. Please feel free to contact Amazon Logistics directly if needed, as their name is clearly shown on the bag. This is not a lost parcel, but an empty Amazon carrier bag left outside my house. Thank you for your assistance. Best wishes, Nayat

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Durban Road, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Goldsmith Nature Garden in terrible state, 8th March
item.description:
Please clean up this council owned park, litter is absolutely everywhere.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Goldsmith Road, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fridge freezer been dumped, 8th March
item.description:
Fridge freezer dumped on pavement
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Highmead, Plumstead

item.title: Litter everywhere on Friary Road, bins over stuffed, 8th March
item.description:
Please make sure all this disgusting litter is cleaned up

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 127, Friary Road, Peckham, Greater London

item.title: Cardboard boxes flytipped on elcot avenue, 8th March
